name: Penciljam Bengaluru at MAP
description:
We are drawing at the Museum of Art and Photography this Sunday.

The Museum of Art & Photography (MAP), located in the heart of Bengaluru, is dedicated to making art accessible and engaging for all. Visit their website to see the current exhibits: https://map-india.org/

We are delighted to continue to partner with MAP who has made the space available for this session from 10:30am to 1pm. A quite day to immerse ourselves at the Museum.
How to join this session
You don't need artistic skill to participate in this event - just boundless curiosity and a love for drawing. To connect with other participants, please use our Discord community app. (Link to the Discord Community Here.)

Please register here to attend this event. Please arrive at the museum before 10:30 am to join the briefing & introduction for this session at the Museum.
Once you arrive at MAP

 	Inform the front desk that you are there for Penciljam,
 	Confirm your name against the RSVP list, you can also register on the spot for this event
 	Leave your bag in the lockers at the basement level.
 	You can carry an A4/A5 or smaller sketchbook and portable dry material kit to draw within.
 	Choose a spot you'd like to sketch and get comfortable - be mindful of not blocking the path of visitors to the museum.

Things to carry for this session:

 	A sketchbook/paper (A4/A5 or smaller sketchbook)
 	Art materials of your choice - Pencils or any dry medium. (within the museum we cannot use wet media like paints. Only non-messy dry media is allowed)

How to get there
This building is opposite the Government Museum.
Follow the location map provided
Closest metro station: Cubbon Park Metro station (900m from MAP)
